metadata.description: Agent skills for Qualcomm Linux workflows: building meta-qcom images, flashing and validating boards, and working on the qcom-next kernel

plugins.name: qcom-device-info
plugins.description: Print SoC/board/OS info from a booted Qualcomm Linux target

plugins.name: qcom-yocto-build-image
plugins.description: Build Qualcomm Linux images from meta-qcom with kas-container

plugins.name: qcom-yocto-download-prebuilt
plugins.description: Download prebuilt Qualcomm Linux (QLI) flashable images from the public CodeLinaro archive

plugins.name: qcom-flash-qdl
plugins.description: Flash a board in EDL mode with the QDL tool

plugins.name: qcom-boot-validate
plugins.description: Validate that a board boots to a working login shell over the serial console

plugins.name: qcom-kernel-qcom-next-build
plugins.description: Cross-build the qcom-next kernel standalone (defconfig + qcom.config fragments)

plugins.name: qcom-yocto-pre-pr-checks
plugins.description: Run meta-qcom's CI-parity checks (patchreview, check-layer, oe-selftest) before a PR

plugins.name: qcom-yocto-update-base-lock
plugins.description: Refresh the layer commit pins in meta-qcom's ci/base.lock.yml with a changelog-style commit

plugins.name: qcom-lava-log
plugins.description: Fetch and analyze LAVA test job logs, results, and definitions via the LAVA REST API

plugins.name: qcom-skills-contribute
plugins.description: Turn local edits to an installed skill from this catalog into a DCO-signed topic-branch commit and, on request, the upstream pull request
